description: A person in dark clothing is standing near the main gate, looking around suspiciously.
The same person is still loitering at the main gate. No vehicle visible.
A blue Ford F150 truck enters the parking lot from the north entrance.
The blue Ford F150 parks near the east wall. Driver exits and walks toward building.
Two individuals are seen near the garage door. One appears to be attempting to open it.
Garage area is now clear. No persons detected. A white sedan is parked inside.
A dog is running along the back fence line. No human activity detected.
The back fence area is empty. Good visibility. No threats detected.
A delivery van (brown UPS-style) has stopped at the main gate. Driver is waiting.
The delivery van has left. Gate is clear. No persons visible.
The blue Ford F150 is exiting the parking lot through the south entrance. Same vehicle as frame 3.
Blue Ford F150 spotted at the garage entrance again. Driver appears familiar from earlier visit.
A person is standing at the main gate at midnight. Behavior appears suspicious, not moving for several minutes.
The person at the main gate is still present. No vehicle. Possible loitering at midnight.
